name: Chase Ink Business Unlimited® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: $1,000 cash back (100,000 Ultimate Rewards points) after you spend $8,000 on purchases in the first 4 months after account opening.
notes: Official Chase Ink Business Unlimited page confirmed $750 struck through to $1,000 cash back after $8,000/4 months on 2026-07-05.

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 1.5% cash back on every purchase for your business.

other_benefits.name: Intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 12 months from account opening on purchases. After that, 16.74%–24.74% variable APR.

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional cost.

other_benefits.name: Auto Credit Limit Increase
other_benefits.description: Automatically considered for a credit line increase every 6 months.

sources.notes: Official Chase product page confirming current $1,000 cash back offer after $8,000 spend in 4 months.
TPG confirms $0 AF, $750 bonus, 1.5% flat, 3% FTf, primary rental, trip cancellation.
Welcome offer history confirms current $750 offer (since Nov 2025).
